nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values:
[Camera Movement] Slow, claustrophobic tracking shot moving forward between the two front seats, increasing the psychological tension.
[Actor Action] Without turning his head, the man slowly turns the steering wheel with a tense, veiny hand. The woman slowly turns her head to glare at his profile, her lips tightly pressed together in silent defiance.
[Environment] Headlights from oncoming traffic sweep across their faces in a rapid flash of blinding white, followed instantly by deep, moody shadows. Cinematic film noir style, high contrast, moody lighting, 35mm film grain, deep shadows, desaturated cool blue tones with intense splashes of vibrant crimson red, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, volumetric atmosphere, intense emotional texture, shot on Arri Alexa.
